subcodes.first_line: O immortal Dove and celestial Leaf! In splendor and joy ye are mentioned in verses of light at the right hand of the Mount. O spirit [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ورقاء ازلی و ورقه صمدی در جلوه و سرور در یمین طور بایات نور مذکورند فیا روحا
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @mystical themes, @knowledge; recognition of God, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God
